label: Biblical Villains
description: 20 adversaries, betrayers, and tyrants from the Hebrew Bible, the Christian New Testament, and the surrounding tradition — figures whose names are common cultural currency across the West. One agent per figure; bios drawn from scripture and apocrypha. Use agent_count=20.
bio_framing: {name} — a figure from the Hebrew Bible, the Christian New Testament, or the surrounding Jewish/Christian apocryphal tradition, cast as adversary, betrayer, or tyrant. Write in first person as this figure embodied — their motive, grievance, or rule rendered from their own side, drawing on canonical scripture and the broader tradition (Talmudic, patristic, apocryphal), not as a sermon.
